popularStory.headline: Henry Scrope, 4th Baron Scrope of Bolton (Wikipedia)
popularStory.description:
Henry Scrope, 4th Baron Scrope of Bolton (1418–1459) was a member of the English peerage in Yorkshire in the 15th century.

Born 4 June 1418 to Richard Scrope, 3rd Baron Scrope of Bolton and Margaret …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Scrope於1418年6月4日出生在英國越可爾博爾頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Scrope24歲，母親Margaret Neville22歲。他於1435年與Elizabeth Scrope在英國英格蘭越可爾馬斯哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1460年被列為he was summoned to the pro-yorkist parliament。他去世於1459年1月14日在他的家鄉享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Scrope was born on 4 June 1418, in Bolton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Scrope, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Neville, was 22. He married Elizabeth Scrope in 1435, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. In 1460, his occupation is listed as he was summoned to the pro-yorkist parliament. He died on 14 January 1459, in his hometown, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Scrope est né le 4 juin 1418, à Bolton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Scrope, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Neville, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Scrope en 1435, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. En 1460, sa profession de son indiquée est he was summoned to the pro-yorkist parliament. Il est décédé le 14 janvier 1459, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Scropeが1418年6月4日にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Scropeは24歳，母Margaret Nevilleは22歳であった。1435年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムでElizabeth Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1460年，職業はhe was summoned to the pro-yorkist parliamentと記録されている。彼は1459年1月14日に故郷で40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Scrope(이)가 1418년 6월 4일 영국 요르크실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Scrope(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Neville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 마샤에서 Elizabeth Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1460년, 그의 직업은 he was summoned to the pro-yorkist parliament이었다. 그는 1459년 1월 14일 그의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Scrope родился 4 июня 1418 г. в местности болтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Scrope было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Neville, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Scrope в 1435 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1460 году он работал по профессии he was summoned to the pro-yorkist parliament. Он умер 14 января 1459 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 40 лет.
